channel.title: World Bank Group Job Vacancies
channel.description: List of vacancies at the World Bank Group

item.title: Investment Officer - Manufacturing & Services West Africa
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of Investment Officer - Manufacturing & Services West Africa Location: Washington, DC.
